text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, with the Oka Sho close at hand, we
finish up with training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's almost here.
choice_data_list: Which means we should make sure to rest.
Which means we should make sure to rest.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I can't afford to fall ill here. That goes for
you too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Air Groove's gaze to find an Umamusume
running with a determined look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right, that's Mejiro Dober. She
came to support Air Groove at her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You head on back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She told me to go on ahead, but... I can't help but
feel curious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I watch quietly from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't recall teaching you to train in such a
self-destructive way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What happened?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm just so angry at myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm so weak... so useless!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: McQueen and Ryan are both so far ahead of me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All the attention that comes with being an
Umamusume from the Mejiro family... It doesn't
faze them at all. They just keep delivering results.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But look at me! I still get crushed by my nerves! I
can't even run properly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Every day I'm falling further behind, and it's so...
painful. I hate it, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I can't do anything about it! I'm so weak... I
hate myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober... What is your ideal?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My what?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When you freeze and lose sight of your path,
uncertain of what you were aiming for. When you
forget what it was you wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Look inside your heart for the unshakable core
that reminds you of what truly matters. That is
your "ideal."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My ideal is my mother.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle with a talented rival, my
mother won the Japanese Oaks and became a
queen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will never forget her dignified stature that day.
When her hard work had paid off, and the glory
she had sought was finally hers. I looked up to her
so much at that moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to become just like her. That's why I
came to this academy and took on the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When I'm tripped up by some trouble and am in
danger of losing my way...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's when my ideal guides me. It always tells me
where I need to go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will win the Japanese Oaks for myself and catch
up to my mother—my ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And one day I'll surpass her and take on realms
unknown. As Empress, I'll guide all Umamusume
forward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm working so hard right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I keep running specifically because of that
dazzling ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So, let me ask you this, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is your ideal?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My ideal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My goal has always been... to not be an
embarrassment to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I look up to McQueen and Ryan... and yet more
than anything, I don't want to lose to them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Air Groove... I don't know the answer... I
don't think I have an ideal...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Chase after me, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: After you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My desire is to lead all Umamusume. That means
being everyone's ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you don't have one of your own...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let me be your ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To prove it, I ask you to watch me take on the
Triple Tiara series.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll prove that I am worthy of becoming your ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Keep yourself warm. It would be a real shame to
catch a cold right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I thought I told you to head back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This appears to be a common thing with you.
choice_data_list: We can do it—let's make you everyone's ideal.
We can do it—let's make you everyone's ideal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we stand together in the twilight, I renew my
vow to support Air Groove in her goal of
becoming everyone's ideal.
